Diagnose precomputed HMM-SSF simulations

Source: R/diagnose_hmmssf.R
diagnose_hmmssf_simulations.Rd

This helper is useful when trajectories are simulated outside the package, for example with a project-specific HMM-SSF simulator. It computes the same diagnostic table and dashboard structure as diagnose_hmmssf() without refitting or resimulating the model.

Usage

diagnose_hmmssf_simulations(
  observed_track,
  simulated_tracks,
  observed_states = NULL,
  simulated_states = NULL,
  reference_transition = NULL,
  label = "simulation",
  diagnostics = c("ud_wasserstein", "msd", "sinuosity", "barrier_crossing",
    "state_occupancy", "state_residence_time", "state_residence_geometric",
    "switching_rate", "transition_counts", "state_conditioned_msd",
    "state_conditioned_step_length", "state_conditioned_turning_angle",
    "state_conditioned_ud", "habitat_use_by_state"),
  barriers = NULL,
  metadata = list(),
  warnings = character()
)

Arguments

observed_track

Observed track.

simulated_tracks

List of simulated tracks.

observed_states

Optional observed or decoded state path.

simulated_states

Optional matrix of simulated state paths.

reference_transition

Optional homogeneous transition matrix used by state_residence_geometric.

label

Label used for the simulation source in plots and tables.

diagnostics

Diagnostic names.

barriers

Optional barriers for future barrier diagnostics.

metadata

Optional metadata added to the output object.

warnings

Optional warnings added to the output object.

Value

Object of class "gmov_hmmssf_diagnostics".
